name: First Aid Kit — SJF P3 (Workplace Kit, Handy)
shortDescription: 15-person handy first aid box with tourniquet, wooden splint and examination gloves.
longDescription: Steps up to a 15-person workplace team, adding a touch-cut scissor, easy-use tourniquet, wooden splint, CPR barrier with gloves and examination gloves — enough range to handle a wound, a burn or a suspected fracture on site.

images.alt: First Aid Kit — SJF P3 (Workplace Kit, Handy) supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Contents
specs.value: First Aid Book x1, Antiseptic Cream 10g x1, Safety Pin x10, Cotton Tip Applicator x20, Adhesive Plaster 19x72mm x15, 25x72mm x5, Round x5, Antiseptic Solution 50ml x1, Tweezer (Plastic) x1, Wound Cleaning Wipes (ALC) x5, Antiseptic Wipes x5, Sterile Gauze Swab 10cm x3, 7.5cm x3, Sterile Burn Dressing 10cm x2, 5cm x3, Sterile Adhesive Plaster 6x10cm x2, Touch-Cut Scissor 5.5" x1, Gauze Bandage 5cm x 3mtr x1, 7.5cm x 3m x1, Dusting Powder 10g x1, Absorbent Cotton 15gms x1, Triangular Bandage x1, Sterile Dressing Medium x1, Tincture Iodine 20ml x1, Microporous Tape 1.25x5m x1, Pain Relief Cream x1, Easy-Use Tourniquet x1, Sterile Oval Eye Pad x2, Wooden Splint x1, Pocket Light Small x1, CPR Barrier with Gloves x1, Sterile Dressing Small x1, Examination Gloves x2, Electrolyte Powder x2, Sugar Sachet x3, Common Salt Sachet x3
